*Envive Care Conference Review - V 4.0
Wound Status: Venous to Left lower leg / Measures 1.6 cm x 4.6 cm / Stage: N/A
Drainage present - serosanguineous, moderate. No odor noted. Treatment: Foam dressing change daily.

Subjective: Patient reports pain at Left lower leg wound site, rates 3/10.
Objective: Wound assessment performed. Venous venous Left lower leg measures 1.6 cm x 4.6 cm x 0.5 cm.
  Wound bed: 48% slough, 52% granulation tissue. Periwound: erythematous.
  Drainage: moderate. Odor: present, foul.
Assessment: Venous venous Left lower leg — improving.
Plan: Nutritional consult ordered. Alginate dressing applied.
